# The Document Index

> The living index of document-AI tooling — OCR, PDF extraction, document parsing, layout
> & structure, table extraction and vision-language understanding — ranked daily by GitHub momentum.

Updated: 2026-06-11T00:36:55.749062+00:00
Tools indexed: 197

## Top document-AI tools by momentum

- [PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR](https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR) — momentum 87, ⭐81754 — OCR Engines — Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit
- [opendatalab/MinerU](https://github.com/opendatalab/MinerU) — momentum 86, ⭐67156 — Document Parsing — Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic
- [docling-project/docling](https://github.com/docling-project/docling) — momentum 86, ⭐61340 — Document Parsing — Get your documents ready for gen AI
- [tesseract-ocr/tesseract](https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tesseract) — momentum 85, ⭐74607 — OCR Engines — Tesseract Open Source OCR Engine (main repository)
- [datalab-to/marker](https://github.com/datalab-to/marker) — momentum 82, ⭐35973 — PDF Extraction — Convert PDF to markdown + JSON quickly with high accuracy
- [ocrmypdf/OCRmyPDF](https://github.com/ocrmypdf/OCRmyPDF) — momentum 82, ⭐33848 — OCR Engines — OCRmyPDF adds an OCR text layer to scanned PDF files, allowing them to be searched
- [opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf](https://github.com/opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf) — momentum 81, ⭐24328 — PDF Extraction — PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.
- [datalab-to/surya](https://github.com/datalab-to/surya) — momentum 80, ⭐20763 — Table Extraction — OCR, layout analysis, reading order, table recognition in 90+ languages

- [Zipstack/unstract](https://github.com/Zipstack/unstract) — momentum 75, ⭐6643 — Document Parsing — LLM-Driven Extraction of Unstructured Data — Built for API Deployments & ETL Pipeline Workflows
- [DayBreak-u/chineseocr_lite](https://github.com/DayBreak-u/chineseocr_lite) — momentum 74, ⭐12314 — Document Parsing — 超轻量级中文ocr，支持竖排文字识别, 支持ncnn、mnn、tnn推理 ( dbnet(1.8M) + crnn(2.5M) + anglenet(378KB)) 总模型仅4.7M
